allow: Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('Custom domains:', d.get\('custom_domain'\), '\\nDomain aliases:', d.get\('domain_aliases'\)\)")

Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(json.dumps\({'custom_domain': d.get\('custom_domain'\), 'domain_aliases': d.get\('domain_aliases'\), 'ssl': d.get\('ssl'\)}, indent=2\)\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('custom_domain:', d.get\('custom_domain'\)\); print\('domain_aliases:', d.get\('domain_aliases'\)\)")
